body.value: 草高 四拾九萬五千四百八十六石餘 (甲子ヨリ戊辰 五ヶ年平均)
草高 (くさだか) は四十九万五千四百八十六石余 — 甲子年から戊辰年までの五ヶ年平均

Sōdaka = 495,486 koku (5-year average, Kashi 甲子 to Boshin 戊辰 = 1864-1868). The averaging window deliberately covers the political crisis years leading into the Boshin War — a 5-year smoothing meant to even out unstable yields during the late-bakumatsu turmoil.
現米 拾八萬九千四百三十一石
現米 (げんまい) は十八万九千四百三十一石
Genmai (actual rice yielded) = 189,431 koku. About 38% of assessed sōdaka — higher than Chōshū's effective rate, reflecting Tosa's directly-taxed coastal-plain rice production.
戸數 九萬三千七百三十六戸
戸数 (こすう) は九万三千七百三十六戸
Households = 93,736. This is the page-89 total. Tosa's full Table 2 stretches across pages 89-L and 89-R, with the demographic detail continuing on p90.
諸産物 — 諸紙・砂糖・同白・黒蜜・鶏卵・蜂蜜・濾蜜・茶・椎茸・楊梅皮・楮草・松脂・茅蠟・蕨粉・蕨繩・檜繩・松節・松烟・桂根・燒物類 ...
諸産物の一覧 — 各種紙・砂糖・黒蜜・蜂蜜・茶・きのこ・薬草・蝋など

Domain products: various papers, sugar (white and black molasses varieties), eggs, honey, filtered honey, tea, shiitake mushrooms, mountain-tea, lacquer-tree bark, paper mulberry, pine resin, kayasoku wax, bracken-root flour, bracken cord, cypress cord, pine joints, pine soot (墨), cassia root, baked ceramics... A long product list characteristic of HI for major domains.
